response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have one brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of recent or sustained C++ development, STL usage, multi-threading, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Proven ability to deliver complex systems with testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, MQTT, REST in automation contexts, or IEC 62443 standards
No evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ system design or cloud-native industrial platform work
